main.description: A dispatcher's acknowledgement of a spawn.request: the new client's bus-minted id and the spawn lineage. Published after the client is minted and its harness launched (or with status=error if the spawn failed).

id.description: The spawned client's bus-minted ULID identity. Set when status is ok.

nickname.description: The spawned client's display name (minted kind=agent).

requestId.description: The frame id of the spawn.request this acknowledges.

job.description: The lineage job id, propagated from the request.

parent.description: The requester id: the bus-stamped author of the spawn.request.

status.description: ok when the client was minted and launched; error otherwise.

error.description: Failure detail when status is error.
